tender.description: Installation of 1(One) Nos. Submersible pump within 80 mm dia and 72 m depth PVC pipe for withdrawn water of drinking tubewell by...new water tank at Bhubandanga Ganeshtala in ward No-07, under Bolpur Municipality.
